ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c),
NOT($Permission.TableauAdmin), NOT($Profile.Name = "System Administrator"), NOT($Profile.Name = "Carmignac - System Administrator"),
RecordType.DeveloperName = "Tableau_Request", ISPICKVAL(Type_of_Request__c, 'New Report'),
OR(ISCHANGED(Tableau_Report_Path_Folder__c), ISCHANGED( Report_Owner__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only Tableau Admins can edit the following fields : Tableau Report Path/Folder, Report Owner.
